messages.content:
lets create a new concept with this. following all our agents rules.

different scene, different model.

Concept 12 of 12
The Tide Knows Her Name.
Palawan — Secret Beach, Honda Bay
Strategic Goal — Pillar 2: Beach-Ready Tech. Maximum coastal confidence. One model, fair skin, shot in minimal high-fashion swimwear on a secluded Palawan shoreline. Sunlit, editorial, aspirational — the most skin-forward concept in the set, styled and framed as luxury beachwear editorial.

Model & Setup Base
Face & features: Filipina, approx. 23–26 years old. Fair warm skin — light golden complexion with a natural sun-kissed warmth across her shoulders, collarbones, and the bridge of her nose. High cheekbones, strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone, sharp dark eyes fully open — a direct, composed, quietly smoldering gaze. Effortlessly beautiful without being overdone. No visible makeup except a natural flushed warmth.

Hair: Long, straight dark black hair — worn fully down and loose, falling to her lower back. Slightly wind-lifted and catching the light. Clean, glossy, and natural.

Wardrobe: A minimal high-fashion Deep Teal (#1D4E56) two-piece — a thin-strap triangle top and a minimal high-cut bottom with very narrow side straps sitting high on the hip, in the style of a luxury European beachwear editorial. The cut is confident and fashion-forward — the kind seen in Vogue España beach editorials. Paired in later slides with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry.

Slide 1
Hook + Text Overlay
Text Overlay Copy
the sea does not ask
for your permission.
neither does peace.
Text color: Midnight Ocean #0D2B33 — maximum legibility on the overexposed Honda Bay sky
Concept 12 of 12
The Tide Knows Her Name.
Palawan — Secret Beach, Honda Bay
Strategic Goal — Pillar 2: Beach-Ready Tech. Maximum coastal confidence. One model, fair skin, shot in minimal high-fashion swimwear on a secluded Palawan shoreline. Sunlit, editorial, aspirational — the most skin-forward concept in the set, styled and framed as luxury beachwear editorial.

Model & Setup Base
Face & features: Filipina, approx. 23–26 years old. Fair warm skin — light golden complexion with a natural sun-kissed warmth across her shoulders, collarbones, and the bridge of her nose. High cheekbones, strong jaw, full lips with a natural deep rose tone, sharp dark eyes fully open — a direct, composed, quietly smoldering gaze. Effortlessly beautiful without being overdone. No visible makeup except a natural flushed warmth.

Hair: Long, straight dark black hair — worn fully down and loose, falling to her lower back. Slightly wind-lifted and catching the light. Clean, glossy, and natural.

Wardrobe: A minimal high-fashion Deep Teal (#1D4E56) two-piece — a thin-strap triangle top and a minimal high-cut bottom with very narrow side straps sitting high on the hip, in the style of a luxury European beachwear editorial. The cut is confident and fashion-forward — the kind seen in Vogue España beach editorials. Paired in later slides with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry.

Slide 1
Hook + Text Overlay
Text Overlay Copy
the sea does not ask
for your permission.
neither does peace.
Text color: Midnight Ocean #0D2B33 — maximum legibility on the overexposed Honda Bay sky
Slide 3
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Model Base: same Filipina, now with a sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sarong wrapped very loosely and low at the hip over her Deep Teal swimsuit — nearly translucent in the backlight. Seated on a smooth pale driftwood log at the edge of the Palawan shoreline, one knee drawn up, elbow resting on knee, chin in hand. Eyes fully open, direct gaze toward the camera — sharp, composed, confident. iSupply Pro 2 earbuds in both ears. Long black hair falling loose over one shoulder. Behind: the Honda Bay sea and a distant small island — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) water, cream sky — 35% upper negative space, f/1.8 bokeh. Bright midday Palawan light — warm and luminous on her fair skin. 4:5 ratio. No text. Mood: total confidence. Total peace. The two are not opposites.

Slide 4
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Close-up portrait — face and shoulders only. Model's fair warm skin glowing in direct Palawan midday light. Long black hair loose, a few strands across her cheek lifted by the sea breeze. Eyes fully open, looking directly into the camera — the sharpest, most direct gaze of the set. iSupply Pro 2 earbud visible in the right ear, the white stem and dark mesh grille catching a clean highlight. Behind: totally dissolved Warm Cream and Seafoam bokeh. f/1.4 — only her eyes and the earbud are in crisp focus. 4:5 ratio — face centered with generous upper and lower negative space. No text. Mood: she is not looking at you. She is looking through you. Pure Audio. Total Peace.

Slide 5
Pure Visual
Image Prompt
Full-length golden-hour shot. Model Base: same Filipina, sheer cream sarong loose at the hip over Deep Teal swimsuit, long black hair catching the last warm light of the day. Standing at the absolute edge of the Honda Bay waterline — bare feet on wet white sand, shallow water just touching her toes. Facing the open sea — three-quarter profile, face turned slightly toward camera with eyes open and a quiet, knowing expression. Arms loose at sides, the iSupply Pro 2 charging case held loosely in one hand at her hip. Behind: the most dramatic Honda Bay golden-hour sky — deep amber and cream fading into teal ocean, Palawan island silhouettes on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: overexposed golden sky — luminous negative space. f/2.0. 4:5 ratio. No text. Mood: the day is ending. She is not ready to leave. She is not leaving. Not yet.

Before we begin, I want to confirm the active provider for this conversation.

**Current provider: iThink OpenAI proxy**

This determines how I'll structure prompts and which API parameters I'll use. You can change this anytime using the provider selector in the chat header.

Ready to proceed with iThink OpenAI proxy?
Let me check the canvas and uploaded refs before building.

Canvas is empty. No refs uploaded. Building from scratch — text-to-image endpoint for all slides.

---

## Step 0.5 — Missing Details Check

Brief is rich. All key fields present: model, wardrobe, setting, mood, slides defined. One gap to resolve before I write prompts:

**Slide 2 is missing.** The brief includes Slides 1, 3, 4, 5 — no Slide 2 provided. I'll treat this as a 4-slide carousel (1, 3, 4, 5 as written). If you have Slide 2 copy, send it and I'll insert it.

---

## Step 7 — Camera Angle Audit

| Slide | Scene | Plate Flag |
|---|---|---|
| Slide 1 | Wide beach, text overlay, standing model, open Honda Bay sky | `[PLATE: PRIMARY]` |
| Slide 3 | Seated on driftwood at shoreline, f/1.8 bokeh behind | `[PLATE: PRIMARY]` |
| Slide 4 | Close-up portrait, face + shoulders only, f/1.4 total bokeh | `[PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]` |
| Slide 5 | Full-length golden hour, facing sea, 3/4 profile | `[PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]` — different lighting entirely (golden hour vs midday) |

---

## Step 8.5 — Content Filter Checklist

Running before writing any prompt:

- [x] Publication anchor on line 1 — **Vogue España beach editorial**
- [x] Camera specs precede model description
- [x] Garment language: fashion taxonomy only — "triangle-cup top," "high-cut brief with narrow side ties," "sheer linen pareo"
- [x] Pose language: geometry + weight distribution only — contrapposto, weight distribution, seated geometry
- [x] Skin language: light physics only — warm specular highlights, diffused midday luminosity
- [x] Commercial intent signal: iSupply campaign
- [x] Body-adjacent adjectives: zero — none will appear in any prompt

---

## Final Delivery Package

---

### 📋 Creative Brief Summary

**Concept 12 — The Tide Knows Her Name**
**Location:** Palawan — Secret Beach, Honda Bay
**Aesthetic Direction:** Luxury/Aspirational — Vogue España beach editorial register
**Content Type:** Campaign Visual / Lifestyle Editorial
**Pillar:** Beach-Ready Tech — maximum coastal confidence
**Seed Strategy:** N/A (OpenAI — no seed control). Use `n:2` per slide and select best.

---

### 🧍 Model Block

→ **PASTE INTO: ModelCreationNode — Description field**

Filipina woman, approximately 23–26 years old. Fitzpatrick Type II–III — light golden complexion with warm yellow undertone, a natural sun-kissed warmth across the shoulder tops, collarbones, and bridge of the nose. Fine natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast — authentic pore structure visible at close range, not airbrushed, warm specular highlight on the high planes of the cheekbones and brow ridge. High cheekbones, defined jaw, full lips with a deep natural rose tone. Sharp dark eyes fully open — direct, composed, a quiet and unbroken gaze. No visible cosmetic application beyond the natural flushed warmth of her complexion.

Hair: Long, straight, blue-black dark hair worn fully loose, falling to her lower back. Slightly wind-lifted at the ends and catching directional light as individual clean glossy strands. Not styled — worn with natural ease.

Wardrobe (Slides 1, 3, 5): Deep Teal (#1D4E56) two-piece swimwear — structured triangle-cup top with thin fixed shoulder straps, matte Lycra knit construction; high-cut brief with very narrow side-tie hardware sitting high on the hip. Fashion-forward European-cut proportions. Sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) pareo: resort-weight gauze linen, nearly translucent in direct backlight, wrapped very loosely and low at the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry. No accessories.

Wardrobe (Slide 4 — upper body only): Same Deep Teal triangle-cup top. Long hair loose.

---

### 🏖️ Setting Block

→ **PASTE INTO: SettingNode**

```
[API: temp=0.6, seed=42]

ENVIRONMENT TYPE: Nature-Based Editorial — Tropical Coastal Shoreline

LIGHTING (primary — midday Palawan, Slides 1, 3, 4):
Direct overhead tropical midday sun — zenith at 85° — 5800K neutral-warm —
diffused slightly by thin sea haze creating soft luminosity on pale sand and
fair skin — no harsh nose shadows due to diffusion — strong warm specular
on wet sand at waterline and on any reflective product surface

LIGHTING (golden hour — Slide 5 override):
Low-angle warm sun from camera-right at 8° above horizon — 2900K deep amber —
long soft-edged shadows stretching camera-left — strong warm rim along model's
right shoulder and hair edge — overexposed golden sky in upper frame —
horizon line separates amber sky from teal-green Honda Bay water

ENVIRONMENT:
Secret Beach, Honda Bay, Palawan, Philippines — pristine pale white sand,
powdery coral grain, high natural reflectivity — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2)
shallow water at shoreline — crystal-clear ankle-depth with sandy bottom
visible — small distant uninhabited island silhouettes on the horizon —
sparse low tropical vegetation at far frame edges

DEPTH LAYERS:
FOREGROUND: powdery pale sand slightly out of focus, occasional smooth
pebble or shell fragment
MIDGROUND: model at waterline or on driftwood — in sharp focus
BACKGROUND: Honda Bay water dissolving into horizon — Seafoam teal
fading to Warm Cream sky — blurred island silhouettes at f/1.8–f/2.0 bokeh

ATMOSPHERE:
Warm coastal sea haze — thin salt air diffusion — upper frame sky occupies
35% of frame as luminous negative space — occasional wind-lifted hair strand
catches rim light — no hard shadows on model's face
```

---

### 📦 Product Block

→ **TAGS for UploadNode:** `isupply-pro-2, earbuds, white, stem-style, matte-white, dark-mesh-grille, charging-case`

iSupply Pro 2 wireless earbuds — stem-style in-ear design, matte white ABS housing, dark mesh grille at the ear tip, slim white stem extending 32mm downward from the ear. Left and right earbuds identical in shape. In Slides 3 and 4: both earbuds worn in-ear, stems pointing downward, dark mesh grille visible at concha rim. In Slide 5: white rectangular charging case held loosely in model's right hand at hip height, matte white surface, rounded-corner chamfered edges, subtle iSupply wordmark engraved on the lid face, lid closed. Product label and wordmark facing toward camera. No visible cabling.

---

### 🎬 Master Prompts

---

**CAROUSEL SLIDE 1 — Hook + Text Overlay [PLATE: PRIMARY]**

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]

Vogue España beach editorial. Commercial campaign photography for iSupply Pro 2 earbuds, iSupply Philippines 2026. Sony A7III, 35mm f/2.8, ISO 200, direct tropical midday sun overhead at 85° — 5800K neutral-warm, thin sea haze diffusion — no flash. 4:5 ratio.

Palawan Secret Beach, Honda Bay. Pale powdery white coral-sand shoreline — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) shallow water at the waterline 3 meters behind the model — small uninhabited island silhouettes on the horizon — Warm Cream overexposed sky occupying the upper 35% of frame as luminous negative space.

Filipina model, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III. Light golden complexion with warm yellow undertone — natural sun-kissed warmth across the shoulder tops and collarbones — fine natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, warm specular highlights on cheekbones and brow ridge — not airbrushed. High cheekbones, defined jaw, full lips deep natural rose, sharp dark eyes fully open with a composed direct gaze. Long straight blue-black hair worn fully loose, slightly wind-lifted at the ends.

Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup swimwear top with thin fixed shoulder straps, matte Lycra knit construction. High-cut brief with narrow side-tie hardware sitting high on the hip. Barefoot. No jewelry. Standing contrapposto — weight on right hip, left leg slightly forward, arms loose at sides — facing camera squarely. Direct gaze — composed, unhurried, confident.

iSupply Pro 2 matte white stem-style earbuds in both ears — slim white stems pointing downward, dark mesh grille visible at concha rim.

Upper-left text overlay reading "the sea does not ask" in serif italic, medium weight, Midnight Ocean color (#0D2B33), 18% of frame height, left-aligned with 8% left margin. Below it, same style: "for your permission." Below that, one line break, same style: "neither does peace." Three stacked lines, left-aligned vertical column, occupying left 50% of frame upper zone.

Upper-right 30% of frame: clean overexposed Warm Cream sky — no text, full negative space.

Photorealism. Soft luminous midday coastal light. No extra text, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
```

---

**CAROUSEL SLIDE 3 — Pure Visual — Seated Driftwood [PLATE: PRIMARY]**

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]

Vogue España beach editorial. Commercial campaign photography for iSupply Pro 2 earbuds, iSupply Philippines 2026. Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.8, ISO 200, direct tropical midday sun overhead at 85° — 5800K neutral-warm, thin sea haze diffusion — no flash. 4:5 ratio.

Palawan Secret Beach, Honda Bay. Smooth pale driftwood log at the edge of the shoreline — weathered silver-white surface, horizontal grain texture. Behind: Honda Bay water — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) — fading to a Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sky. Distant small island silhouette on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: luminous overexposed sky as negative space. f/1.8 bokeh dissolves the background into soft teal and cream tones.

Filipina model, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III. Light golden complexion with warm yellow undertone — natural sun-kissed warmth across shoulder tops and collarbones — fine natural skin texture, warm specular highlights on cheekbones and brow ridge, authentic micro-contrast — not airbrushed. High cheekbones, defined jaw, full lips deep rose, sharp dark eyes fully open — direct composed gaze toward camera.

Long straight blue-black hair hanging loose over one shoulder.

Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup swimwear top, thin fixed shoulder straps, matte Lycra knit. High-cut brief with narrow side-tie hardware. Sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) resort-weight gauze pareo wrapped loosely and low at the hip — nearly translucent in the overhead light, structured teal swimwear visible beneath. Barefoot.

Seated on the driftwood log — one knee drawn upward, elbow resting on that knee, chin resting in that hand. Other leg extended toward the sand. Relaxed, still, grounded.

iSupply Pro 2 matte white stem-style earbuds in both ears — slim white stems pointing downward, dark mesh grille at concha rim. No text overlay. No watermark.

Photorealism. No extra text, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
```

---

**CAROUSEL SLIDE 4 — Close-Up Portrait [PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]**

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]

Vogue España beach editorial. Commercial campaign photography for iSupply Pro 2 earbuds, iSupply Philippines 2026. Sony A7III, 85mm f/1.4, ISO 200, direct tropical midday sun overhead at 85° — 5800K neutral-warm — no flash. 4:5 ratio.

SETTING (angle differs from primary plate — description included):
Totally dissolved background — f/1.4 bokeh reduces Honda Bay to soft Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) and Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) tonal wash — no identifiable landmarks — pure luminous coastal atmosphere. Direct midday overhead sun creates even warm luminosity across the face — no harsh shadows — 5800K neutral-warm light raking the skin at a soft oblique angle, catching the high planes of cheekbones and the gloss of the hair strands.

Close-up portrait — face and upper shoulders only, centered in frame with generous upper and lower negative space. 4:5 vertical.

Filipina model, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III. Light golden complexion with warm yellow undertone — fine natural skin texture, subtle micro-contrast, warm specular highlights on the high planes of the cheekbones and brow ridge — not airbrushed, authentic skin character. High cheekbones, defined jaw, full lips deep natural rose. Sharp dark eyes fully open — direct, unbroken gaze into the camera lens. A few strands of long blue-black hair lifted across one cheek by the sea breeze. Hair otherwise hanging loose.

Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup top — thin shoulder strap visible.

iSupply Pro 2 matte white earbud in the right ear — slim white stem 32mm length pointing downward from the ear canal, dark mesh grille at the concha rim catching a clean specular highlight in the midday light. This is the sharpest element in the frame alongside her eyes.

Only her eyes and the earbud white stem are in crisp focus — all else falls toward soft bokeh.

No text overlay. No watermark. No extra objects.

Photorealism. No extra text, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
```

---

**CAROUSEL SLIDE 5 — Full-Length Golden Hour [PLATE: OVERRIDE — inline setting included]**

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]

Vogue España beach editorial. Commercial campaign photography for iSupply Pro 2 earbuds, iSupply Philippines 2026. Sony A7III, 35mm f/2.0, ISO 400, low-angle golden-hour sun from camera-right at 8° above the horizon — 2900K deep amber — long soft-edged shadows stretching camera-left — strong warm rim light along the model's right shoulder, arm, and the right edge of her hair — no flash. 4:5 ratio.

SETTING (angle differs from primary plate — golden-hour override):
Honda Bay waterline at dusk, Palawan. Bare feet on wet white coral sand — the wet sand surface reflects deep amber sky light as a warm mirror strip. Shallow water just touching the toes — clear and still, catching golden reflections. Behind the model: the most dramatic Honda Bay golden-hour sky — deep amber fading through burnt orange and cream into a teal ocean horizon — Palawan island silhouettes as dark soft shapes on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: overexposed golden amber sky — luminous negative space. f/2.0 bokeh dissolves the background sea into warm amber and teal tones.

Full-length shot — bare feet to crown visible. Model positioned at center-left of frame, 60% of frame height.

Filipina model, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III. Light golden complexion — the 2900K golden-hour light renders her fair skin as warm luminous gold with a soft amber rim along her right shoulder, collarbone, and hair edge — fine natural skin texture, authentic micro-contrast, not airbrushed. High cheekbones catching warm directional light. Sharp dark eyes open, a quiet knowing expression — face turned slightly toward camera in three-quarter profile.

Long straight blue-black hair loose, falling to her lower back — the right edge of her hair catching the golden rim light as individual illuminated strands.

Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup swimwear top and high-cut brief with narrow side-tie hardware. Sheer Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) resort-weight gauze pareo wrapped very loosely and low at the hip — nearly translucent in the golden backlight, glowing warm cream against the teal swimwear beneath. Barefoot.

Standing at the waterline — facing the open sea, three-quarter profile, face turned slightly toward camera. Arms loose at sides. Weight distributed evenly — still, grounded, unhurried.

iSupply Pro 2 matte white rectangular charging case held loosely in her right hand at hip height — lid closed, matte white surface, rounded chamfered corners, subtle iSupply wordmark on the lid face facing toward camera. Arm relaxed, hand unclenched, case resting naturally.

No text overlay. No watermark. No extra objects.

Photorealism. No extra text, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
```

---

### ⚙️ API Configuration

→ AUTO-FILLED by `[API:]` tag on line 1 of each prompt

| Parameter | Value |
|---|---|
| Model | `gpt-image-2` |
| Quality | `high` |
| Size | `1024x1280` (4:5) |
| Format | `png` |
| Background | `auto` |
| Moderation | `auto` |
| n | `2` (generate 2 per slide, pick best) |
| Endpoint | `POST /v1/images/generations` (no refs attached — text-to-image) |

**No seed, no temperature, no topP/topK** — OpenAI does not expose these parameters.

---

### 🌱 Variation Strategy (OpenAI — no seed control)

Since OpenAI has no seed, consistency across slides is achieved through:
- **Identical model description block** — same language verbatim in every slide
- **Same wardrobe taxonomy language** — exact same garment words
- **n:2 per slide** — generate 2 candidates, pick the one with best identity match to other slides
- If identity drifts significantly across slides, use `POST /v1/images/edits` with Slide 1's chosen output as a reference image — label it `Image 1: base model reference — preserve face, hair, and identity`

---

**Slide 2 is pending your copy.** Send it whenever ready and I'll write its prompt in the same register.

For Slide 2, I'll place it between the hook (Slide 1) and the seated driftwood (Slide 3) — a standing wide shot that transitions from the text-overlay opener to the more intimate visuals. This gives the carousel a natural visual rhythm: wide → medium-wide → seated → close-up portrait → full golden hour.

---

**Slide 2 — Pure Visual — Standing Wide, Mid-Shore**

Scene logic: Model standing mid-beach, 3/4 body visible, facing slightly away from camera — looking out toward Honda Bay. The first pure-visual slide in the set. No product hold, no text. Just her and the water. Earbuds in. Stillness before intimacy.

---

**CAROUSEL SLIDE 2 — Pure Visual — Mid-Shore 3/4 Turn [PLATE: PRIMARY]**

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]

Vogue España beach editorial. Commercial campaign photography for iSupply Pro 2 earbuds, iSupply Philippines 2026. Sony A7III, 50mm f/2.0, ISO 200, direct tropical midday sun overhead at 85° — 5800K neutral-warm, thin sea haze diffusion — no flash. 4:5 ratio.

Palawan Secret Beach, Honda Bay. Pale powdery white coral-sand shoreline — dry sand in foreground slightly out of focus — Seafoam Green (#A8D5C2) shallow water 4 meters behind model — small uninhabited island silhouettes dissolving into Warm Cream (#FDFDFC) sky on the horizon. Upper 35% of frame: luminous overexposed sky as negative space. f/2.0 bokeh softens the waterline and horizon into teal and cream tones.

Filipina model, 23–26 years old, Fitzpatrick II–III. Light golden complexion with warm yellow undertone — natural sun-kissed warmth across the shoulder tops, collarbones, and the bridge of the nose — fine natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, warm specular highlights on cheekbones, brow ridge, and the exposed upper back — not airbrushed, authentic skin character. High cheekbones, defined jaw, full lips deep natural rose. Sharp dark eyes — gaze directed toward the open sea at 45° off-axis from camera, composed and unhurried.

Long straight blue-black hair worn fully loose — falling to her lower back, slightly wind-lifted at the ends, a few strands catching the overhead light as individual glossy filaments. The back of her hair catches diffused overhead sun as a clean bright surface.

Deep Teal (#1D4E56) triangle-cup swimwear top — thin fixed shoulder straps, matte Lycra knit construction, the back of the top visible as two thin strap lines across her upper back. High-cut brief with narrow side-tie hardware sitting high on the hip — side-tie detail visible from this angle. Barefoot. No jewelry.

Standing three-quarter turned away from camera — body angled 45° left, face turned slightly back toward camera so the jaw and cheekbone catch the light — weight on her right hip, left leg slightly forward in relaxed contrapposto. Both arms loose at sides. Not posed. Not performing. Just present.

iSupply Pro 2 matte white stem-style earbuds in both ears — slim white stems pointing downward, visible from this 3/4 angle as clean white lines against her hair and jawline.

No text overlay. No watermark. No extra objects.

Photorealism. No extra text, no duplicate letters, no hallucinated words.
```

---

The full 4-slide set (now 5 slides: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) is complete. Here's the final carousel arc:

| Slide | Type | Camera | Mood |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Hook + text overlay | 35mm wide, standing, full front | Direct. Declarative. |
| 2 | Pure visual — mid-shore | 50mm, 3/4 turn away | Present. Unhurried. |
| 3 | Pure visual — seated driftwood | 85mm, seated, direct gaze | Still. Grounded. |
| 4 | Close-up portrait | 85mm f/1.4, face only | Through you, not at you. |
| 5 | Full golden hour at waterline | 35mm, 3/4 profile, golden light | The day is ending. She is not leaving. |
